goal: Build a peg-in-hole insertion array: 4 cylindrical pegs, 4 holes, robot inserts each. Uses add_force_torque_sensor + setup_assembly_constraint. Realizes #22 Peg-in-Hole Insertion Array infrastructure.
thoughts:
Six peg-in-hole specifics for CP-58:
1) 4 cylindrical pegs (5cm tall, 2cm radius) on conveyor.
2) 4 holes (slightly larger cylinders, 5cm deep) in a panel behind robot at xy(0.05, -0.4) spacing 0.10m.
3) Force/torque sensor on Franka panda_hand for insertion-force monitoring.
4) setup_assembly_constraint binds each peg→hole pair. Engaged when peg aligned within 5mm tolerance.
5) Robot picks peg, transit, descend into hole.
6) Realizes infrastructure for #22. Runtime force-gated phase transitions are Sprint 4+.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# 4 pegs (cylindrical) on conveyor
for i, x in enumerate([-1.4, -1.15, -0.9, -0.65]):
    path = f"/World/Peg_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cylinder", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], radius=0.02, height=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Peg_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [f"/World/Peg_{i+1}" for i in range(4)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Hole panel + 4 holes
create_prim(prim_path="/World/HolePanel", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, -0.4, 0.775], scale=[0.30, 0.10, 0.025])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/HolePanel", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Holes are markers (xform) — actual cylindrical holes would need mesh ops.
# Each hole xy is a target drop position; assembly_constraint defines peg→hole binding.
for i, x in enumerate([-0.15, -0.05, 0.05, 0.15]):
    hole_path = f"/World/Hole_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=hole_path, prim_type="Xform", position=[x, -0.4, 0.825])
    setup_assembly_constraint(
        peg_path=f"/World/Peg_{i+1}",
        hole_path=hole_path,
        tolerance=0.005,
    )

# Force/torque sensor on Franka panda_hand
add_force_torque_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/Franka/FtSensor",
    parent_path="/World/Franka/panda_hand",
    threshold=5.0,
)

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# Controller drops each peg at its hole position
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Peg_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    destination_path="/World/HolePanel",
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Peg_1": [-0.15, -0.4, 0.825],
        "/World/Peg_2": [-0.05, -0.4, 0.825],
        "/World/Peg_3": [ 0.05, -0.4, 0.825],
        "/World/Peg_4": [ 0.15, -0.4, 0.825],
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/HolePanel"],
)
extension_notes: CP-58 demonstrates peg-in-hole infrastructure. Uses force_torque sensor + assembly_constraint per peg/hole pair. Real insertion physics (force-gated phase transitions, search spiral on alignment failure) requires controller integration in Sprint 4+. CP-58 ships the scaffolding.
failure_modes: Holes are Xform markers — no actual cylindrical holes via subtractive mesh. Peg lands on top of HolePanel.
Force sensor on panda_hand — UsdPhysics applies; runtime sensor value reading needs controller integration.
Cylindrical pegs (radius 2cm, height 5cm) — gripper grips long axis. Within 4cm gripper opening since diameter 4cm.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✗ (peg-in-hole assembly — earlier ✓ was false positive due to target_path override; real target is HolePanel and cube doesn't reach it)
code_template:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

# Pegs (cylindrical) on conveyor
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cylinder", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, radius=0.02, height=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cylinder", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, radius=0.02, height=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cylinder", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, radius=0.02, height=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, prim_type="Cylinder", position={{workpieces[3].position}}, radius=0.02, height=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Hole panel + 4 hole markers
create_prim(prim_path={{hole_panel.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{hole_panel.position}}, scale={{hole_panel.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{hole_panel.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

create_prim(prim_path={{hole_markers[0].path}}, prim_type="Xform", position={{hole_markers[0].position}})
setup_assembly_constraint(peg_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, hole_path={{hole_markers[0].path}}, tolerance=0.005)
create_prim(prim_path={{hole_markers[1].path}}, prim_type="Xform", position={{hole_markers[1].position}})
setup_assembly_constraint(peg_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, hole_path={{hole_markers[1].path}}, tolerance=0.005)
create_prim(prim_path={{hole_markers[2].path}}, prim_type="Xform", position={{hole_markers[2].position}})
setup_assembly_constraint(peg_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, hole_path={{hole_markers[2].path}}, tolerance=0.005)
create_prim(prim_path={{hole_markers[3].path}}, prim_type="Xform", position={{hole_markers[3].position}})
setup_assembly_constraint(peg_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, hole_path={{hole_markers[3].path}}, tolerance=0.005)

# Force/torque sensor on robot hand
add_force_torque_sensor(
    sensor_path={{ft_sensor.path}},
    parent_path={{ft_sensor.parent_path}},
    threshold={{ft_sensor.threshold}},
)

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

# Controller drops each peg at its hole position
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}],
    destination_path={{hole_panel.path}},
    drop_targets={
        {{workpieces[0].path}}: {{hole_markers[0].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[1].path}}: {{hole_markers[1].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[2].path}}: {{hole_markers[2].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[3].path}}: {{hole_markers[3].drop_target}},
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{hole_panel.path}}],
)
